subject: Support Dual stuck - for difference version
commit_message:
Support Dual stuck - for difference version

E2E Defect 430981 - ip_requirments for multiple ports with difference version wasn't supported

Change-Id: Ib6424e12d2c260e7d05687295d4e3b82f9e6a27f
Issue-ID: SDC-1096
Signed-off-by: eleonorali <eleonoral@amdocs.com>
